description: Parser behavior is covered through a public loader rather than a redundant unit test.

feature_artifacts.requirements.md:
# Requirements
The settings loader accepts yes/true/1 as enabled values, no/false/0 as disabled values, and rejects any other boolean text.
feature_artifacts.spec.md:
# Spec
Parser behavior may be verified through the public loader contract; no separate private parse_bool test is required when loader tests cover true, false, and invalid inputs.
